# Cashflow Design System

> React component library (@connor-adams/designsystem). 45 components across 7 categories. All components are imported from the package root.

Full inventory with prop schemas: /components.json

## Core
- [Accordion](/components/accordion): A disclosure stack for FAQs, settings groups, and statement breakdowns. Props: items, type, defaultValue, collapsible.
- [Avatar](/components/avatar): A circular person avatar (account holder, shared-ledger member) with an initials fallback when the image is missing. Props: src, name, size, status, ring.
- [Badge](/components/badge): Small pill for status, category, and counts — `default` is oxblood brand fill, `secondary` the neutral workhorse. Props: variant.
- [Button](/components/button): Cashflow's action button — solid oxblood `primary` for the main CTA, neutral variants for the rest, tinted `destructive` for deletes. Props: variant, size.
- [Card](/components/card): The default raised surface — white card, hairline border, light shadow, rounded-lg. Everything sits in one.
- [Icon](/components/icon): Stroke glyph from the built-in registry — lucide-style, renders in `currentColor`, sized by the `size` prop. Props: name, size, strokeWidth, title.
- [Kbd](/components/kbd): A keycap for documenting shortcuts in menus, tooltips, and command hints.
- [Link](/components/link): An inline anchor for body copy and table cells. Defaults to the oxblood-leaning `--text-link`; underline appears on hover only. Props: muted, subtle, external.
- [Progress](/components/progress): A determinate bar for budgets, savings goals, and import progress. Use `tone` to signal state (e.g. `danger` when a category is over budget). Props: value, tone, size, indeterminate, label, showValue.
- [Separator](/components/separator): A hairline rule to separate sections, list rows, or inline metadata. Props: orientation, label.
- [Spinner](/components/spinner): An indeterminate loading ring for buttons, inline fetches, and empty panels. Inside a Button it inherits the label color via `tone="current"`. Props: size, tone, label.
- [Text](/components/text): The single typography primitive — use it for every piece of text instead of bare tags so the type scale and token colors stay consistent. `variant` sets the scale step and a default tag; `as` overrides the tag. Props: variant, as, tone, weight, mono, align.

## Data
- [LetterAvatar](/components/letter-avatar): LetterAvatar component. Props: text, size.
- [StatCard](/components/stat-card): StatCard component. Props: label, value, hint, delta, metricKind.
- [Table](/components/table): Table component. Props: maxHeight.
- [Tabs](/components/tabs): Tabs component. Props: items, value, onValueChange.

## Feedback
- [Alert](/components/alert): Alert component. Props: variant, title, action.
- [EmptyState](/components/empty-state): EmptyState component. Props: title, description, actions.
- [Skeleton](/components/skeleton): Skeleton component. Props: w, h.

## Finance
- [AccountCard](/components/account-card): A tile for a connected account in lists and the accounts grid. Props: name, institution, mask, balance, currency, locale.
- [AmountText](/components/amount-text): The money-value primitive — use it for every currency figure instead of hand-coloring spans, so the green-in / oxblood-out convention stays consistent. Props: value, currency, locale, direction, colored, showSign.
- [BudgetMeter](/components/budget-meter): A budget-vs-spend row for the budgets screen and category drill-downs. The bar self-colors: green under budget, amber near the limit, oxblood over. Props: label, spent, limit, currency, locale, warnAt.
- [CategoryBreakdown](/components/category-breakdown): A card that ranks money by category as horizontal bars — the "net spend by category" tile. Props: rows, title, subtitle, trend, trendTone, max.
- [CategoryPill](/components/category-pill): The category chip for transaction rows, filters, and budgets — icon + label with a per-category tint, drawn from a built-in icon set. Props: category, label, icon, color, interactive, size.
- [ImportDropzone](/components/import-dropzone): The statement-import target for the import flow — drag-and-drop or click-to-browse a CSV/OFX file. Props: accept, onFile, hint.
- [MoneyInput](/components/money-input): A currency amount field for adding/editing transactions and setting budgets. Pass `direction` + `onDirectionChange` to show the in/out toggle. Props: value, defaultValue, onValueChange, currency, locale, direction.
- [PeriodSelector](/components/period-selector): The date-range control every ledger view needs — preset periods with an optional custom range, in a compact popover. Props: value, onValueChange, custom, onCustomChange, presets, size.
- [Sparkline](/components/sparkline): A tiny trend line to sit beside a balance or inside a StatCard — green when the series rises, oxblood when it falls. Props: data, width, height, tone, area, dot.

## Forms
- [Checkbox](/components/checkbox): A square checkbox for multi-select and form opt-ins (select transactions, terms). Use `indeterminate` on a header checkbox when some but not all rows are selected. Props: checked, defaultChecked, onCheckedChange, indeterminate.
- [Combobox](/components/combobox): A searchable single-select for long option lists (assign a category, pick a payee, choose an account). For a handful of fixed options use NativeSelect. Props: options, value, defaultValue, onValueChange, placeholder, emptyText.
- [Input](/components/input): Input component. Props: invalid.
- [Label](/components/label): Label component.
- [NativeSelect](/components/native-select): NativeSelect component. Props: size, options.
- [RadioGroup](/components/radio-group): A single-choice radio group for mutually-exclusive options (account type, statement period). Exported as `RadioGroup`. Props: options, value, defaultValue, onValueChange, name, orientation.
- [Slider](/components/slider): A single-value range control for budgets, thresholds, and filters (e.g. "alert when a transaction exceeds $X"). Props: min, max, step, value, defaultValue, onValueChange.
- [Stepper](/components/stepper): A compact numeric input for small bounded quantities (split count, reminder days, statement months back). Props: value, defaultValue, onValueChange, min, max, step.
- [Switch](/components/switch): A pill toggle for on/off settings (notifications, auto-reconcile) — oxblood when on. Use over Checkbox for instant-apply settings, not form submission. Props: checked, defaultChecked, onCheckedChange, size.
- [Textarea](/components/textarea): Textarea component. Props: invalid.
- [ToggleGroup](/components/toggle-group): A segmented control for switching between a few mutually-exclusive views (timeframe, chart type, account filter). For navigation between content panels prefer Tabs; use this for filters and settings. Props: items, type, value, defaultValue, onValueChange, size.

## Navigation
- [Breadcrumb](/components/breadcrumb): A path trail for nested views (Accounts › Amex Cobalt › Statements). Props: items.
- [Pagination](/components/pagination): Page navigation for long transaction lists and search results. Props: page, pageCount, onPageChange, siblingCount.

## Overlays
- [Dialog](/components/dialog): A modal for confirmations and short forms (delete transaction, edit category, add account). Keep the footer to one primary + one secondary Button. Props: open, onClose, title, description, footer, size.
- [DropdownMenu](/components/dropdown-menu): A row/overflow action menu (the ⋯ on a transaction, account, or report). Use `danger` for delete and a `separator` to group destructive actions. Props: trigger, items, align, className, style.
- [Toast](/components/toast): A transient confirmation that floats bottom-right (transaction saved, statement imported, sync failed). Auto-dismiss after a few seconds; keep copy to one line. Props: variant, title, action, onClose, className, style.
- [Tooltip](/components/tooltip): A small hover/focus hint for icon buttons and truncated values (full merchant name, exact timestamp). Keep content to a few words — never essential-only info. Props: content, side, className, style.
